query:
WITH card_aggregates AS (
            SELECT
                cr.card_oracle_id,
                COUNT(*) AS total_ratings,
                AVG(cr.points) AS average_global_points
            FROM card_rating cr
            GROUP BY cr.card_oracle_id
        ),
        card_ranks AS (
            SELECT
                ca.card_oracle_id,
                ca.total_ratings,
                ca.average_global_points,
                DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ca.average_global_points DESC) AS card_rank
            FROM card_aggregates ca
        ),
        unrated_rank AS (
            SELECT
                1 + COUNT(DISTINCT cr.average_global_points)::INT AS unrated_card_rank
            FROM card_ranks cr
            WHERE cr.average_global_points > 0.0
        )
        SELECT
            c.oracle_id,
            c.name,
            c.image_uri,
            c.legality as "legality: CardLegality",
            COALESCE(cr.average_global_points, 0.0) as "global_points!",
            COALESCE(cr.total_ratings, 0) as "total_ratings!",
            COALESCE(cr.card_rank, urr.unrated_card_rank) as "card_rank!"
        FROM card c
        LEFT JOIN card_ranks cr ON cr.card_oracle_id = c.oracle_id
        CROSS JOIN unrated_rank urr
        WHERE c.oracle_id = $1
        LIMIT 1
